Chakalte'

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Relief of Enthroned Ruler (Chakalte')
by Chakalte'
Classic Maya · 770 CE
A limestone wall relief of a seated king before an attendant, carved and signed by the sculptor Chakalte' — one of the few Maya artists whose name we know, in a culture where authorship was sometimes acknowledged.
←K’in Lakam Chahk Chancay→
